name: critical-risk-escalation
description: Critical risk signal should escalate to strong interruption or call escalation behavior.

signal.title: Critical risk shift on watched token
signal.body: Token PEPE (0x6982...C85d) on BSC: owner wallet executed removeAllLimits() followed by a 2.8M USDT liquidity removal in a single block. Contract ownership was NOT renounced. On-chain audit flags: unlimited mint capability detected, honeypot risk score jumped from 12 to 89. Total locked liquidity dropped from $4.2M to $1.4M in 3 minutes. 847 holders affected. This pattern matches 94% of historical rug-pull signatures.
